Description.English: A coastal table — line-caught fish, the raw bar and the catch of the day.
Description.Portuguese: Uma mesa à beira-mar — peixe do dia, marisco fresco e a pesca da casa.

Description.English: Shucked to order from the ice — pristine and briny.
Description.Portuguese: Abertos na hora sobre o gelo — puros e salgados do mar.

ShortDescription.English: Six rock oysters, lemon and mignonette
ShortDescription.Portuguese: Seis ostras, limão e molho mignonette

FullDescription.English: Six cold-water rock oysters shucked to order, served on crushed ice with fresh lemon, shallot mignonette and a dash of Tabasco.
FullDescription.Portuguese: Seis ostras de água fria abertas na hora, servidas sobre gelo picado com limão fresco, molho mignonette de chalota e um toque de Tabasco.

Ingredients.English: Rock oysters, lemon, red wine vinegar, shallots, black pepper
Ingredients.Portuguese: Ostras, limão, vinagre de vinho tinto, chalotas, pimenta preta

FullDescription.English: Plump tiger prawns gently poached and chilled, hung over a glass of spiced tomato and horseradish dipping sauce.
FullDescription.Portuguese: Gambas tigre suculentas escalfadas e arrefecidas, servidas sobre um copo de molho de tomate especiado com rábano.

Ingredients.English: Tiger prawns, tomato, horseradish, lemon, celery salt
Ingredients.Portuguese: Gambas tigre, tomate, rábano, limão, sal de aipo

ShortDescription.English: Thin-sliced scallop, citrus and olive oil

FullDescription.English: Diver scallops sliced paper-thin, dressed with blood-orange, extra-virgin olive oil, sea salt and a whisper of chilli.
FullDescription.Portuguese: Vieiras laminadas finíssimas, temperadas com laranja sanguínea, azeite virgem extra, flor de sal e um toque de malagueta.

Ingredients.English: Scallops, blood orange, olive oil, sea salt, chilli
Ingredients.Portuguese: Vieiras, laranja sanguínea, azeite, flor de sal, malagueta

Description.English: Small plates to open the tide.
Description.Portuguese: Pequenos pratos para abrir a maré.

ShortDescription.English: Steamed in white wine, garlic and cream
ShortDescription.Portuguese: Cozidos em vinho branco, alho e natas

FullDescription.English: A steaming pot of rope-grown mussels opened in white wine, garlic, shallots and a touch of cream, finished with parsley and grilled sourdough.
FullDescription.Portuguese: Uma panela fumegante de mexilhões abertos em vinho branco, alho, chalotas e um toque de natas, finalizados com salsa e pão de massa-mãe grelhado.

Ingredients.English: Mussels, white wine, garlic, shallots, cream, parsley, butter
Ingredients.Portuguese: Mexilhões, vinho branco, alho, chalotas, natas, salsa, manteiga

ShortDescription.Portuguese: Pastéis de sapateira dourados, aioli de lima

FullDescription.English: Two pan-fried cakes packed with hand-picked white crab meat, sweetcorn and herbs, served on a smear of charred-lime aioli.
FullDescription.Portuguese: Dois pastéis salteados recheados de carne branca de sapateira, milho doce e ervas, servidos sobre aioli de lima tostada.

Ingredients.English: Crab meat, breadcrumbs, egg, sweetcorn, lime, mayonnaise, garlic
Ingredients.Portuguese: Carne de sapateira, pão ralado, ovo, milho doce, lima, maionese, alho

ShortDescription.Portuguese: Atum cortado à faca, sésamo e abacate

FullDescription.English: Ruby-red yellowfin tuna hand-cut and tossed with sesame oil, soy, spring onion and avocado, crowned with crisp wonton shards.
FullDescription.Portuguese: Atum rabilho rubro cortado à faca e envolvido em óleo de sésamo, soja, cebolinho e abacate, coroado com lascas de wonton crocante.

Ingredients.English: Yellowfin tuna, sesame oil, soy, avocado, spring onion, wonton
Ingredients.Portuguese: Atum rabilho, óleo de sésamo, soja, abacate, cebolinho, wonton

Description.English: Whole fish and fillets straight from the grill.
Description.Portuguese: Peixe inteiro e filetes diretamente da grelha.

ShortDescription.Portuguese: Filete de salmão, manteiga de limão e endro

FullDescription.English: A thick Atlantic salmon fillet grilled over coals, finished with lemon-dill butter and served with charred asparagus and new potatoes.
FullDescription.Portuguese: Um filete espesso de salmão do Atlântico grelhado na brasa, finalizado com manteiga de limão e endro e servido com espargos tostados e batatinhas novas.

Ingredients.English: Salmon, butter, lemon, dill, asparagus, new potatoes
Ingredients.Portuguese: Salmão, manteiga, limão, endro, espargos, batatinhas novas

ShortDescription.English: Whole sea bass, fennel and lemon

FullDescription.English: A whole line-caught sea bass roasted with fennel, lemon and thyme until the skin blisters, finished with a drizzle of green olive oil.
FullDescription.Portuguese: Um robalo inteiro de anzol assado com funcho, limão e tomilho até a pele estalar, finalizado com um fio de azeite verde.

Ingredients.English: Sea bass, fennel, lemon, thyme, olive oil, garlic
Ingredients.Portuguese: Robalo, funcho, limão, tomilho, azeite, alho

ShortDescription.English: Lobster, crab, prawns and oysters to share
ShortDescription.Portuguese: Lavagante, sapateira, gambas e ostras para partilhar

FullDescription.English: Our showpiece for two — half a lobster, dressed crab, tiger prawns, oysters, clams and whelks piled high on ice with three house sauces.
FullDescription.Portuguese: A nossa estrela para dois — meio lavagante, sapateira recheada, gambas tigre, ostras, amêijoas e búzios sobre gelo com três molhos da casa.

Ingredients.English: Lobster, crab, tiger prawns, oysters, clams, whelks, lemon
Ingredients.Portuguese: Lavagante, sapateira, gambas tigre, ostras, amêijoas, búzios, limão

Description.English: A sweet calm after the storm.
Description.Portuguese: Uma doce calmaria depois da tempestade.

Name.Portuguese: Tarte de Limão e Flor de Sal

ShortDescription.Portuguese: Creme de limão ácido, merengue tostado

FullDescription.English: A crisp pastry case filled with sharp lemon curd and a pinch of sea salt, topped with torched Italian meringue.
FullDescription.Portuguese: Uma base de massa estaladiça recheada com creme de limão ácido e uma pitada de flor de sal, coberta com merengue italiano tostado.

Ingredients.English: Lemon, butter, eggs, sugar, flour, sea salt
Ingredients.Portuguese: Limão, manteiga, ovos, açúcar, farinha, flor de sal

ShortDescription.Portuguese: Creme de chocolate salgado, espuma do mar

FullDescription.English: A silky pot of 70% dark chocolate cream finished with a salted caramel ripple and an airy 'sea-foam' of vanilla.
FullDescription.Portuguese: Uma taça sedosa de creme de chocolate negro a 70% com fio de caramelo salgado e uma 'espuma do mar' arejada de baunilha.

Ingredients.English: Dark chocolate, cream, milk, caramel, sea salt, vanilla
Ingredients.Portuguese: Chocolate negro, natas, leite, caramelo, flor de sal, baunilha

Description.English: Crisp pours to match the salt air.
Description.Portuguese: Bebidas frescas a condizer com o ar salgado.

FullDescription.English: A bright, mineral white from the Atlantic coast — citrus and saline on the finish, the natural partner to the raw bar.
FullDescription.Portuguese: Um branco luminoso e mineral da costa atlântica — citrinos e salinidade no final, o par natural do marisco cru.

ShortDescription.Portuguese: Soda cítrica da casa com alecrim

FullDescription.English: House-made soda of grapefruit, lime and a rosemary syrup over plenty of ice — alcohol-free and bracingly fresh.
FullDescription.Portuguese: Soda caseira de toranja, lima e xarope de alecrim sobre muito gelo — sem álcool e revigorante.

Ingredients.English: Grapefruit, lime, rosemary, sparkling water, sugar
Ingredients.Portuguese: Toranja, lima, alecrim, água com gás, açúcar
